positive: A symmetrical, stylized celestial botanical arrangement featuring glowing bioluminescent flora and crescent moons nestled within delicate cosmic dust clouds. The composition should be centrally focused, maintaining a clean silhouette suitable for large-scale apparel printing. Use a limited, highly contrasted color palette of deep midnight blues, iridescent purples, vibrant cyan accents, and touches of brilliant gold leaf detailing. The art style should blend neo-sacred geometry with psychedelic line art, executed with sharp, crisp vector-like edges and a magical, ethereal glow. High contrast, elegant, minimalist yet detailed, flat lay style, vector art, symmetry, perfect composition, suitable for t-shirt print.
